goal: PARITY-001 full-card parity evidence NotRun reduction framework

requiredArtifactsPerSourceEffect.producer: Future Unity exporter running the original DCGO scenario
Future RL.Engine parity trace exporter for the same scenario

statusTransitionRules.condition: Unity fixture exists but RL fixture is missing
Unity/RL fixtures exist but comparison report is missing
Comparison report exists with status Passed
Comparison report exists with status Failed

forbiddenEvidence: Synthetic fixture without Unity exporter output
Manual status promotion in generated scaffold registry
CardEffect body implementation while preparing parity fixtures

candidateSelectionPolicy.candidateSelectionReason: Stable first-window queue for source-locked Unity/RL fixture generation.

candidateQueue.coverageReason: Unity parity fixture file is missing.
nextReductionSteps: Create source-locked Unity parity fixture from the original Unity DCGO scenario.
Create matching RL parity trace from the same scenario seed, decklist, and action sequence.
Run the typed parity comparer and write the comparison report.
Regenerate full-card parity evidence; only a Passed comparison report may reduce NotRun.

fnd001Cs07UnsupportedKeywordMapping.title: unsupported trigger/process keyword static factory mapping
fnd001Cs07UnsupportedKeywordMapping.partialReason: factory facade는 일부 static keyword만 지원하며 Pierce/Retaliation/Alliance/Vortex/Scapegoat/Iceclad/Progress 등 trigger/process 성격 keyword shape는 source mapping 없이는 static descriptor로 추정하면 안 된다.

cardData: keyword effect source samples from CardEffectFactory/KeyWordEffects and CardEffectCommons/KeyWordEffects

closureTasks: factory method를 static keyword, trigger keyword, process/replacement keyword로 분류한다.
unsupported keyword shape는 explicit failure/remediation queue로 남기고 ContinuousOrStaticEffect Verified 근거로 쓰지 않는다.
testCandidates: CardEffectFactory keyword static effect rejects unsupported keyword shape

fnd001Cs14OrderingBoundary.title: AutoProcessing priority/cut-in/background ordering parity
fnd001Cs14OrderingBoundary.partialReason: AutoProcessing.GetSkillInfos/StackSkillInfos/ActivateBackgroundEffects와 cut-in/background ordering은 source collection의 실제 실행 순서를 좌우하므로 source mapping 없이 Verified 근거로 쓸 수 없다.
closureTasks: priority/cut-in/background ordering을 ContinuousOrStaticEffect closure blocker 또는 별도 capability로 분리한다.
동시 trigger priority를 현재 passing tests만으로 source parity 처리하지 않는다.
testCandidates: existing TriggerPipeline continuation tests as candidates only

conclusion.existingImplementationTrust: Do not trust as Verified. Reuse only as source-mapped candidates until SourceOfTruth parity and foundation blockers are closed.
conclusion.nextImplementationReason: OpenCodeReady=false, unsupported capability count=26, partially implemented capability count=37, full-card parity NotRun.
recommendedNextScopes: FND-003 ImplementableFoundationTask items as separate implementation goals
TRUST follow-up for DeleteCandidate cleanup policy after user approval
Data policy pass for CardBaseEntity/no-effect/metadata interpretation

trustBoundary.reason: Parity fixtures should be compared against source-mapped reusable code only after current trust boundaries are refreshed.
